ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-10-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Continued To May-10-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carole Ann Derby, via zoom, in propria persona Personal Representative.

Ms. Derry reports that she believed that the Inventory and Appraisal has been filed and offers additional testimony regarding the delays with this matter. The court reminds Ms. Derry that this matter is more than thirty (30) years old and it should have been resolved by now and that she should consider hiring an attorney to assist her. After additional discussion, the court advises Ms. Derry that if the Final Inventory and Appraisal and Petition for Final Distribution are not filed by the next calling of this matter, the court will consider removing her and appoint the San Francisco Public Administrator to close this estate.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to May-10-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-18-2022 Continued To Mar-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carole Ann Derry, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Personal Representative.

Ms. Derry reports that she has spoken to the probate referee appointed to this matter and is working on finalizing an Inventory and Appraisal. Ms. Derry also reports that she has a draft of a Petition for Final Distribution and has consulted with an attorney to assist her with finalizing the petition. The court commends Ms. Derry for her efforts and recognizes her challenges but reminds her that the estate must close and that she should hire a professional to assist her in doing so. The court advises Ms. Derry to forward any papers that the probate referee requires as soon as possible to help finalize and file the Inventory and Appraisal.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Mar-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Neves. Not reported.
Continued From 2/26 To 3/12/91 Petn. For Letters Of Admin.
